problem.description: Tokens less than 2 hours old getting Grade A and then rugging (ALIENS at 11min, XTuber at 1h)

solution.description: Added minimum age requirement of 2 hours for Grade A, auto-reject under 30min

results.lesson: Age < 2h = high rug risk. Pattern now extracted and auto-protected.
